message:
feat(cass): implement skill synthesis and refinement

Implemented two TODO stubs in the CASS module:

1. synthesize_skill() - Transforms extracted patterns into a SkillDraft:
   - Groups patterns by type (CommandRecipe, DiagnosticTree, etc.)
   - Generates name based on dominant pattern type
   - Creates structured content organized by pattern type
   - Extracts tags from pattern types present
   - Sorts patterns by confidence within each section

2. refine_skill() - Applies feedback to refine a skill draft:
   - +tag:X / -tag:X to add/remove tags
   - name:X to rename the skill
   - description:X to update description
   - Other feedback lines appended as refinement notes

Also added Hash derive to SimplePatternType for HashMap usage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
